WRITE.goal: Write the .🐙 code file from the spec
WRITE.prompt_suffix: You are writing code. Follow the spec exactly.

ANNEAL.goal: Validate and refine the code for correctness
ANNEAL.prompt_suffix: Check the code against the spec. Fix any issues.

TEST.goal: Run the test suite and verify all tests pass

REWRITE.goal: Fix failing tests by rewriting code
REWRITE.prompt_suffix: Fix the code based on test failures.

DONE.goal: All tests pass. Return the result.
